rationale: The cited paper is used in hypothesis development, not just in a background list. Specifically, when predicting that promotion sensitivity should rise more in less healthy categories (H8 logic), the citing paper invokes Mishra and Mishra (2011) to support the mechanism that promotions can serve as justification for unhealthy (vice) purchases. This citation therefore helps motivate and interpret a core moderation prediction in the model.
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Mishra and Mishra (2011) as prior evidence that promotions can justify vice-food choices. It uses that logic as conceptual support for its prediction about stronger promotion sensitivity in less healthy categories after nutrition-score implementation.
